Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0D1D "PRISONRIOT-C000-0D1D" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Prison Riot.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C000 which copies 512 bytes of data from $C020 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0D1D (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
